header.subhead: Five years building production SaaS, booking platforms, and AI-integrated web apps. From database to deployed UI, owned end to end.

leadSegments.text: , a full-stack developer who turns ideas into running software.

body: For the past five years I've built and maintained complex web applications end to end: project-management dashboards, booking platforms with payments and admin panels, and clean marketing front-ends that convert. Across the stack I work with React, Next.js, Node.js, Laravel, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.

body.text: I help startups and businesses ship real, working features: SaaS MVPs,
APIs, and full-stack builds owned from database to deployment.

body: Based in Paris and fluent in English and French, I work async-first with clear updates and clean, maintainable code. You get a developer who asks the right questions before writing a line.
Open to full-stack roles and long-term remote contracts. If you're building a SaaS MVP or need AI features in an existing product, send me a message.

principles.title: End-to-end ownership
principles.body: One developer from data model to deployed UI. Schema, APIs, frontend, and the pipeline that ships it.

principles.title: Clean, maintainable code
principles.body: Code the next developer can read. Clear structure, sensible names, and a build that survives handoff.

principles.title: Clear communication
principles.body: Regular progress updates and the right questions asked before a line gets written. Async-first, written-first.

principles.title: Shipped on schedule
principles.body: Five years of delivering working features to real users, on the timeline we agreed.
